title: Lamb Kebabs with Mediterranean Flair
description: A flavorful and aromatic lamb kebab recipe, seasoned with the bold flavors of the Mediterranean. This dish is perfect for a warm evening or a special occasion.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, Mediterranean spice blend, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Brush the lamb with buttery olive oil during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Remove the lamb from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the lamb kebabs hot, garnished with additional oregano if desired.
